snapshots.sections_text:
PART: Budget Tracker
NAME: Budget Tracker
STATUS: draft

DATA: Budget Categories
MARKER: budget_categories
INTENT: holds all budget categories and their balances
---
The app holds a list of budget categories. Each category has a name, a current balance, and a monthly limit.

STRUCTURE: Home Screen
MARKER: home_screen
INTENT: the main screen showing budget overview
---
The screen has a header with the app name, a summary of total income and expenses, a list of categories with their balances, and a button to add a new category at the bottom.

WHEN: Add Category
MARKER: add_category
INTENT: user adds a new budget category
---
When the user taps the "Add Category" button, a form appears. The user fills in the category name and monthly limit. The new category is added to the list and its balance is set to zero.

WHEN: Update Category Balance
MARKER: update_category_balance
INTENT: user updates a category's balance
---
When the user taps the edit icon on a category card, a form appears. The user can adjust the balance. The updated balance is saved and reflected in the list.

ASSERT: Category Limits
MARKER: category_limits
INTENT: ensure categories do not exceed their limits
---
A category's balance cannot exceed its monthly limit. If a category's balance exceeds its limit, an alert is shown to the user.

SURFACE: Category Card
MARKER: category_card
INTENT: display category information
---
Each category card shows the category name, current balance, and monthly limit. The balance is displayed in a color-coded format: green for under budget, yellow for close to budget, and red for over budget.
